Perfectly blending comfort, style, and convenience, this property offers a peaceful retreat with easy access to all essential amenities.Property Specifications This spacious 4 BHK flat for sale, offers an exceptional blend of comfort and functionality, with a built-up super area of 3800 sqft. Located on the top 3rd floor of a 3-floor building, this semi-furnished apartment ensures privacy and peace. The flat is designed for both residential and office purposes, making it a versatile investment. It features 4 generously sized bedrooms, including 4 attached bathrooms, 1 common bathroom, and 1 servant bathroom. The bathrooms are a mix of Indian and Western styles, all equipped with geysers. Two balconies are attached to the living room and the master bedroom, offering scenic views of the main road. The living and dining areas are separate, creating a spacious environment for relaxation and entertainment. The kitchen is designed as a normal kitchen, and a utility area is attached to the kitchen for added convenience. The flooring features a combination of wooden and ceramic tiles, adding a sophisticated touch to the interiors. Vaastu compliant and facing east, this apartment ensures a positive environment.Unique features set this property apart from others. There are two large balconiesterraces, providing outdoor space that can be utilized for gardening or enjoying privacy. These expansive terraces offer ample room for greenery and outdoor living. The apartment occupies the entire 3rd floor, with no shared lobby space, ensuring maximum privacy. It spans from one lift lobby to the other, with entrances on both sides and private lift lobby space accessible only to residents. Ample cross ventilation is available, thanks to large windows in most rooms, enhancing natural light and air circulation. The spacious layout ensures that family members have their own private spaces, and if desired, the apartment can be restructured into two separate units in the future. Though the apartment doesnt have a dedicated play area, the terraces can easily accommodate childrens play equipment, providing a fun space for kids. The prime location, large size, good ventilation, and private terraces make this apartment a truly unique and desirable property.
